# Space Defender Game Implementation Guide

This repository is a game project. Use these instructions to build the complete game in phases, based on the roadmap in README.md.

## How to use
- Start at Phase 1 and follow the task list.
- Each phase file is focused on concrete coding milestones, not theoretical learning.
- Use Copilot Chat slash (`/`) queries with keywords: "ship movement", "enemy collision", "power-up", "high scores", "deploy".

## Phase instruction files
- `.github/instructions/phase1-game-setup.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/phase2-game-loop-and-input.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/phase3-core-mechanics.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/phase4-polish-and-ui.instructions.md`
- `.github/instructions/phase5-release-and-backlog.instructions.md`
